mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_order WHERE store_idx = #{StoreIdx} AND NOT order_status IN ('PAYMENT_PENDING','CANCELLED')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_order( room_idx, store_idx, leader_member_idx, order_mode, payment_mode, order_status, order_total_amount ) VALUES ( #{roomIdx}, #{storeIdx}, #{leaderMemberIdx}, #{orderMode}, #{paymentMode}, 'PAYMENT_PENDING', #{orderTotalAmount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'PAID', payment_confirmed_at= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx}
UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'ACCEPTED', store_confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status = 'PAID'
UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'PREPARING' WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status = 'ACCEPTED'
UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'READY' WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status = 'PREPARING'
UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'DELIVERING' WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status = 'READY'
UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status IN ('READY', 'DELIVERING')
UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx}
UPDATE group_order SET order_status = 'CHECKED_IN', checked_in_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx}
